answer: Claude Mythos 5 is Anthropic's most powerful AI model, launched on June 9, 2026 alongside its publicly available counterpart, Claude Fable 5. Both models share the same underlying architecture, but Mythos 5 has its safety classifiers lifted in certain areas — specifically cybersecurity — making it available only to a restricted group of trusted partners through Project Glasswing, in collaboration with the US government. The model represents a significant capability leap: Anthropic's internal protein design experts used it to accelerate drug design workflows by roughly 10x, and it autonomously conducted novel genomics research over a week-long session, training a custom ML model that outperformed a recently published Science journal paper. On software engineering, Stripe reported that Fable 5 (the same base model) compressed months of engineering work into a single day within a 50-million-line codebase. Pricing for both models is $10 per million input tokens and $50 per million output tokens — less than half the price of the earlier Mythos Preview. Access to Mythos 5 is currently limited to Glasswing cyber-defence partners and a planned trusted access program for select biomedical researchers; broader availability is expected once Anthropic refines its safeguards further.
